@if(!is_company() && !is_group()){ } @if(is_company()){

{{companies().length > 1 ? 'Vos entreprises' : 'Votre entreprise'}}

@for (company of companies(); track $index) { @if(company.logo){ } @if(!company.logo){

{{company.name[0] | uppercase}}

}

{{company.name}}

}
} @if(is_group()){

{{group_joined().length > 1 ? 'Vos Invitations' : 'Invitation'}}

@for (group of group_joined(); track $index) { @if(group.logo){ } @if(!group.logo){

{{group.name[0] | uppercase}}

}

{{group.name}}

}
}
